name: @pryzm/plugin-multiplayer
description: PRYZM 2 — Multiplayer plugin (S44).  Pure Canvas2D + DOM rendering of remote-peer awareness state.  Subscribes to PryzmAwareness from @pryzm/sync-client and exposes (a) a per-host CursorRenderer that draws remote cursors into any Canvas2D context (3D overlay, plan-view, section-view, sheet-editor), (b) a PeerListPanel HTMLElement for the editor sidebar, and (c) a ViewChip helper for per-peer view/tool indicators.  No THREE, no transport.  Spec: PHASE-2D §S44 lines 285-376.
